title: SWD Promotion League champions to be determined this Saturday
description: CRICKET NEWS - The winners of the SWD...
bodyText:
CRICKET NEWS - The winners of the SWD Promotion League will be determined on Saturday.

Mossel Bay, who was relegated from the premier league last season, will take on New Dawn Park at the Recreation Ground. The match will start at 10:00.


> The twelfth round of the premier league will also be contested on Saturday.


An interesting match is expected at the Bridgton Sport Grounds between Union Stars I and Pacaltsdorp United. Both teams will be without their professional players.

The Women's Division 2 final between Knysna Cavaliers and Plett Pioneers will be played at the REC Ground on Sunday (starting at 11:00).

Saturday

Premier league

Union Stars I vs Pacaltsdorp United

Sussex vs Union Stars II

Plett Pioneers vs Knysna Cavaliers

Promotion league final

Mossel Bay vs New Dawn Park

Reserve division

Union Stars B vs Dysselsdorp, George B vs Pacaltsdorp United B

Sunday

Women's division 2 final

Knysna Cavaliers vs Plett Pioneers

One of the promotion league finalists, Mossel Bay.

‘We bring you the latest Garden Route, Hessequa, Karoo news’
